liveWorkflows.title: See how work flows through Aipify.

1.question: What changed this week?
1.answer: Three operational shifts need attention: support volume increased 12%, two approvals are overdue, and inventory for SKU-442 is below threshold. I recommend reviewing the support queue first — it affects customer response times today.

2.question: Show revenue risks.
2.answer: Two renewal conversations lack owner assignment, and one enterprise account shows declining engagement. I have prepared a summary with recommended owners and suggested follow-up timing for your review.

3.question: Prepare board report.
3.answer: I can prepare a draft board summary covering operational health, key risks, and strategic priorities from approved sources. Would you like me to include support metrics and approval backlog status?

4.question: What should I focus on today?
4.answer: Your highest-impact items: approve the vendor contract waiting since Monday, review the weekly operations briefing, and assign an owner to the overdue support escalation. Each includes context and estimated effort.

5.question: Which approvals need attention?
5.answer: Four approvals are pending: two support responses, one inventory reorder, and one policy exception. The inventory reorder is time-sensitive — stock falls below minimum in 48 hours if not approved.

knowledgePage.faqIntro: Transparent answers about the product, trust, and enterprise readiness.

1.a: Aipify is a Business Operating System — an operational intelligence platform for support, knowledge, governance, workflows, and business visibility with human control built in.

2.a: No. Aipify is a Business Operating System — not a chatbot, helpdesk, CRM, or automation tool. Conversation is one surface; the product is operational coordination with governed workflows and audit trails.

3.a: No. Aipify augments people. It prepares drafts, organizes knowledge, and handles repeatable work within approved boundaries. Your team makes important decisions.

4.a: Aipify helps your business stay organized, respond faster, and work smarter — through support, knowledge, follow-up, operations, deliverables, trust controls, and explainable clarity.

5.a: No. Aipify is not employee surveillance software. It should not monitor screens, keystrokes, private files, or browsing history.

6.a: Yes. Aipify can generate reports, summaries, certificates, spreadsheets, presentations, and other business deliverables.

7.q: Can Aipify be used by larger companies?
7.a: Yes. Aipify is designed with multi-tenant architecture, roles, permissions, audit logs, SSO readiness, and enterprise deployment readiness.

8.q: How does Aipify become more useful over time?
8.a: Organizations can gradually delegate approved workflows to Aipify through explicit, reversible, and auditable trust policies.

what-is-a-business-operating-system.title: What is a Business Operating System?
what-is-a-business-operating-system.metaDescription: A Business Operating System coordinates knowledge, operations, governance, and intelligence — beyond chatbots and point tools.
what-is-a-business-operating-system.introduction: Most organizations run on disconnected software: a helpdesk here, spreadsheets there, chat tools everywhere. A Business Operating System (BOS) unifies operational coordination — with human control built in.

sections.heading: Beyond single-purpose tools
sections.body: A BOS connects support, knowledge, workflows, approvals, and executive visibility. It does not replace your ERP or CRM — it orchestrates operational intelligence above them.

sections.heading: Governed by design
sections.body: Sensitive actions require human approval. Policies define what Aipify may prepare versus execute. Every important step is auditable.

sections.heading: Modular activation
sections.body: Organizations activate Business Packs and modules as needed — hospitality, support, warehouse, finance — without unnecessary complexity.

sections.heading: Who benefits from a BOS
sections.body: Operations leaders gain coordinated visibility. Support teams access approved knowledge at the point of work. Executives receive briefings with context and recommended actions — not raw counts. IT and security teams retain governance controls over permissions, approvals, and audit trails.

installing-aipify-web-app.title: Installing the Aipify Web App
installing-aipify-web-app.metaDescription: Install the Aipify Web App on desktop and mobile for quick access with the same secure workspace, login, and organization permissions.
installing-aipify-web-app.introduction: The Aipify Web App lets you open Aipify from your home screen, dock, or taskbar — using the same app.aipify.ai workspace, sign-in, and permissions you already trust. It is not a separate product or browser extension.

sections.heading: What is the Aipify Web App?
sections.body: The Aipify Web App installs Aipify to your device for quick access in a dedicated app window. You continue using app.aipify.ai with your existing account. It is not a second portal, browser extension, or standalone product license.

sections.heading: Benefits
sections.body: Open Aipify in one tap from your home screen or dock. Work in a focused app window without browser tab clutter. Use the same secure workspace, roles, approvals, and Business Packs you already have. Receive improvements when Aipify releases updates — without managing a separate install package.

sections.heading: Supported platforms
sections.body: Chrome and Edge on desktop support full installation with Install Aipify. Android Chrome supports Add to Home screen. iPhone, iPad, and Safari on macOS support Add to Home Screen or Add to Dock where the browser offers it — with limited standalone behavior compared to Chromium browsers.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: Installation does not bypass Aipify sign-in, two-factor authentication, or organization permissions. Sensitive actions still require human approval under your existing policies. The Web App uses the same secure session and tenant isolation as the browser workspace.

sections.heading: Offline behavior
sections.body: Limited cached content may be available briefly, but Aipify is designed for connected operational work. Do not expect full offline operation. Sign-in, approvals, and live operational data require a network connection.

sections.heading: Updates
sections.body: When you open the installed app, Aipify loads the latest release from our servers. Updates are not guaranteed to appear on your device until the app is opened again. You do not need to download or manage update packages manually.

sections.heading: Remove or reinstall
sections.body: You can remove the installed app from your browser or device settings at any time. Your Aipify account, subscription, and organization data remain unchanged. Reinstall later from the Aipify install page, login screen, or your browser menu when installation is supported.

examples.title: Desktop workflow
examples.body: Sign in to app.aipify.ai in Chrome → Select Install Aipify → Review the Aipify panel → Confirm in your browser dialog → Open Aipify from your dock or taskbar.

examples.title: Mobile workflow
examples.body: Open app.aipify.ai in Chrome on Android → Tap Install Aipify or Add to Home screen → Confirm → Launch from your home screen with the same sign-in.

keyTakeaways.1: The Aipify Web App is quick access to app.aipify.ai — not a separate product.
keyTakeaways.2: Sign-in, two-factor authentication, and organization permissions remain fully enforced.
keyTakeaways.3: You can remove or reinstall from device or browser settings without affecting your subscription.

how-aipify-install-works.title: How Aipify Install works
how-aipify-install-works.metaDescription: Learn how Aipify Install connects to your website, store, or business systems — with read-only access first, guided setup, and full control over permissions.
how-aipify-install-works.introduction: Aipify Install is how your organization connects Aipify to the systems you already use — such as a website, online store, or custom admin. You stay in control: Aipify learns from approved access, prepares recommendations, and never bypasses your sign-in or approval policies.

sections.heading: What is Aipify Install?
sections.body: Aipify Install is the guided setup that links your organization to Aipify Core. It is not a separate product or browser extension. After connection, Aipify works inside your existing environment so your team can get operational help where they already work.

sections.heading: Who is it for?
sections.body: Install is for organization owners, administrators, and technical contacts who are authorized to connect business systems. If you are joining an existing workspace, ask your administrator to invite you instead of starting a new install.

sections.heading: What can you connect?
sections.body: Common starting points include WordPress, WooCommerce, Shopify, and custom websites or admin panels. The wizard asks what platform you use and adapts the steps. If you are unsure, you can choose a guided path and confirm details with your team.

sections.heading: Read-only access first
sections.body: Aipify begins with read-only access so it can learn structure, roles, and operational patterns without changing your data. Write access or sensitive actions require explicit approval under your organization's policies.

sections.heading: Connection keys in plain language
sections.body: Some platforms use a connection key or API credential so Aipify can reach your system securely. The install wizard shows exactly what is needed, where to paste it, and which permissions are requested. Standard users do not need to manage raw install tokens — developer settings are available for advanced rotation when required.

sections.heading: Security and trust
sections.body: Sign-in, two-factor authentication, and organization permissions remain enforced. Sensitive actions require human approval. Connection activity is auditable. Aipify stores operational metadata — not raw customer conversations, payment details, or unnecessary private records.

sections.heading: Testing before you go live
sections.body: After connection, Aipify enters a supervised learning period. Review discovered capabilities, approve or adjust recommendations, and confirm behavior with a pilot team before expanding automation.

sections.heading: Revoking access
sections.body: You can pause or disconnect an installation from your Aipify workspace at any time. Revoking access stops new sync and operational actions; your account, subscription, and configuration remain under your control.

sections.heading: Need help?
sections.body: Use the in-app install assistant, Knowledge Center, or contact your Aipify administrator. For new organizations, complete registration first — the wizard opens automatically after your workspace is created.

examples.title: Online store
examples.body: Choose Shopify or WooCommerce → Sign in to Aipify → Approve read-only connection → Review what Aipify discovered → Activate recommended modules with admin approval.

examples.title: Custom admin
examples.body: Choose custom website or developer setup → Confirm domain ownership → Provide connection details shown in the wizard → Test with a pilot team → Expand permissions only when trust and policy allow.

keyTakeaways.1: Aipify Install connects to systems you already use — it does not replace them.
keyTakeaways.2: Read-only access comes first; sensitive actions always require human approval.
keyTakeaways.3: You can pause, test, and revoke connections from your workspace at any time.

customer-feedback-and-product-improvemen.title: Customer Feedback and Product Improvement Guidelines
customer-feedback-and-product-improvemen.metaDescription: How Aipify collects and uses voluntary customer feedback to improve products, workflows, and support — without advertising or resale.
customer-feedback-and-product-improvemen.introduction: Submitting feedback through Aipify is always voluntary. This page explains how feedback is used, what information may be included, and how Aipify protects your privacy.

sections.heading: Voluntary participation
sections.body: You choose whether to share feedback. Aipify never requires feedback to use your workspace, subscription, or Business Packs.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: Feedback helps Aipify improve products, workflows, usability, documentation, and support. It may identify bugs, missing functionality, and customer needs that guide product decisions.

sections.heading: No advertising or resale
sections.body: Aipify does not use submitted feedback for advertising and does not sell feedback to advertisers or third parties.

sections.heading: Information you provide
sections.body: You control what you write in the title, description, feedback type, priority, and whether you request a response. Only include information you are comfortable sharing.

sections.heading: Page and device context
sections.body: When you enable Include current page and device context, Aipify may attach limited technical metadata such as the current APP route, browser type, device category, application version, organization identifier where required for support, timestamp, and language. Aipify does not include passwords, authentication tokens, complete API keys, payment-card data, private messages, private files, or unrelated customer content.

sections.heading: Contact request
sections.body: When you select Contact me regarding this feedback, Aipify may use your account’s approved contact information to follow up about that specific submission only.

sections.heading: Anonymized product improvement
sections.body: Aipify may use aggregated or anonymized measurements to identify recurring problems, reliability issues, usability patterns, feature adoption, and areas requiring improvement. Free-text feedback you submit is not automatically anonymous.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Feedback is retained only as long as required for product improvement, support follow-up, security, documentation, and legal or audit obligations under Aipify’s approved retention policies.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You can review submitted feedback history in the feedback dialog, request correction where supported, contact Aipify Support with questions about data handling, and ask how your submission is used.

keyTakeaways.1: Feedback is voluntary and used only to improve Aipify.
keyTakeaways.2: You control what you write; optional context excludes sensitive credentials.
keyTakeaways.3: Aipify does not sell feedback or use it for advertising.

1.q: What is the Aipify Web App?

4.a: Chrome and Edge on desktop, Chrome on Android, and Safari on iOS, iPadOS, and macOS (where Add to Home Screen or Add to Dock is available). Support varies by platform and browser version.

5.q: How do I install on Chrome or Edge desktop?
5.a: Sign in to app.aipify.ai, select Install Aipify from the menu or install page, review the Aipify panel, then confirm in your browser installation dialog.

6.q: How do I install on Android?
6.a: Open app.aipify.ai in Chrome, tap Install Aipify or Add to Home screen when offered, confirm in your browser, then open Aipify from your home screen.

7.q: How do I install on iPhone or iPad?
7.a: Open app.aipify.ai in Safari, tap Share → Add to Home Screen, confirm, then launch Aipify from the icon. Sign in with your existing account.

8.q: Why don't I see Install Aipify?
8.a: Your browser or device may not support installation, you may already have the app installed, or installation may be limited on your platform. Try Chrome or Edge on desktop, or use Add to Home Screen in Safari on Apple devices.

9.q: What happens when I choose Continue to installation?
9.a: Aipify shows a summary of what installation means. Your browser then displays the final confirmation dialog. Installation completes only after you confirm in the browser.

10.q: Can Aipify install without my confirmation?
10.a: No. Installation always requires explicit confirmation in your browser or device dialog. Aipify never installs silently.

11.q: Does the Web App work offline?

12.a: When you open the installed app, Aipify loads the latest release from our servers. Updates appear when you next open the app — you do not manage update packages manually.

13.a: Yes. The Web App uses the same secure sign-in, session handling, and tenant isolation as app.aipify.ai. Installation does not weaken security controls.

15.q: Do my organization permissions stay the same?
15.a: Yes. Roles, Business Pack access, and approval policies are identical in the Web App. Installation does not change permissions.

16.q: Can I install on multiple devices?
16.a: Yes. Install the Aipify Web App on each device you use. Each device maintains its own local install while sharing your account and organization settings.

17.q: How do I open Aipify after installing?
17.a: Open Aipify from your home screen icon, dock, taskbar entry, or app list — depending on your platform. You remain signed in when your session is active.

18.q: How do I remove the Web App?
18.a: Remove the installed app from your browser apps page, device home screen settings, or operating system app list. Your Aipify account and data are unaffected.

19.a: Yes. Reinstall from the Aipify install page, login screen, or your browser menu whenever installation is supported on your device.

20.a: Standalone mode opens Aipify in a dedicated app window without browser chrome. Chromium browsers on desktop support full standalone behavior. Safari and some mobile installs may open more like a home screen shortcut.

21.a: No. Installing the Web App does not change your plan, billing, or licensed Business Packs. It is only a local access method.

22.q: Can I install from the login page?
22.a: Yes. When your browser supports installation, Install Aipify is available from the login page and other entry points after you sign in.

23.q: What data is stored on my device?
23.a: Your device may store cached assets and session tokens needed for performance and sign-in convenience. Operational business data remains governed by Aipify Core — not duplicated as a full offline copy on your device.

24.q: Does the Web App send notifications?
24.a: If your organization enables Presence or desktop notifications and your browser allows them, notifications may appear for the installed app. You control notification preferences in Aipify settings and your device.

25.a: No. The Aipify Web App is a Progressive Web App install — not a browser extension from an extension store.

26.a: Try a supported browser, ensure you are signed in, clear the browser install prompt if stuck, and retry. Contact your administrator or Aipify support if the issue persists.

27.a: Contact your organization administrator for access issues. For product support, use your organization's Aipify support channel or visit the Knowledge Center and install guide.

28.q: Where is the full installation guide?
28.a: The full guide is available at /install on the Aipify website and in this Knowledge Center article. Platform-specific steps are listed for desktop, Android, and Apple devices.

items.question: What is an Aipify Growth Partner?
items.answer: A Growth Partner is an independent business professional who helps organizations adopt Aipify. Partners build customer relationships, complete certification, and earn commission through a transparent partner program — not an affiliate scheme.

items.question: Is this an affiliate or referral program?
items.answer: No. Growth Partners operate registered businesses, complete certification, and build long-term customer portfolios. Aipify provides platform infrastructure, governance, and partner support.

items.question: What are the requirements to apply?
items.answer: You must operate through a registered business, provide accurate registration details, accept the Growth Partner Terms, and complete certification before active selling rights are granted.

items.question: How does certification work?
items.answer: After application review, you complete training modules covering platform fundamentals, Business Packs, Companion, governance, and customer positioning. Certification is required before you represent Aipify to customers.

items.question: When can I start selling?
items.answer: Active selling rights are granted after certification and partner approval. Until then, Partner Success guides you through onboarding and training.

items.question: How are commissions tracked?
items.answer: Attribution, commission rules, accrual, and payout history are visible inside the Growth Partner portal. Calculations follow published partner terms — not hidden formulas.

items.question: Do I own the customers I bring?
items.answer: Customers belong to Aipify Platform. Growth Partners receive attribution and commission for qualified customers they introduce, but do not own customer accounts.

items.question: What support does Aipify provide?
items.answer: Partner Success in Bergen, Norway supports onboarding and certification. Partners also access sales material, demo assets, training, and the Knowledge Center through the portal.

items.question: Can I operate in multiple countries?
items.answer: Partners may serve customers in markets aligned with Aipify availability and partner terms. Discuss international scope with Partner Success during onboarding.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Complete the application on this page. Partner Success reviews your submission, confirms next steps, and guides you through certification and portal access.
